clean_text: BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro Rum | Golden Aged Rum | BACARDÍ Global OUR RUMS OUR RUMS White Rum BACARDÍ CARTA BLANCA Flavors Flavors Range Spiced BACARDÍ Spiced Dark Rum BACARDÍ Carta Oro BACARDÍ Carta Negra BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Diez BACARDÍ Gran Reserva Limitada ready to enjoy BACARDÍ x coca-cola Ready to Drink cocktails Ready to Serve cocktails BACARDÍ Coquito View all our rums Cocktails Experiences Experiences Casa BACARDÍ Puerto Rico Visit the World’s largest premium rum distillery. SUSTAINABILITY Our World FAQS COCKTAILS CUATRO HIGHBALL GOLD RUM BACARDÍ AÑEJO CUATRO A blend of rums aged for a minimum of four years under the Caribbean sun, BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro 4 year old rum has a unique taste and a soft, golden colour. VIDEO HOW TO MAKE A CUATRO HIGHBALL BASK IN FLAVOR Tasting Notes Enjoy notes of mild vanilla, toasted oak, clove and honey with a smooth finish. Nose Vanilla and cinnamon Palate Dark honey and clove Finish Toffee and oak Cuatro means ‘four’, after the years the spirit has spent aging beneath the Caribbean sun. EXPLORE THE ANGEL'S SHARE Under the warmth of the Caribbean sun, some golden liquid vanishes to the heavens. Michael B. Jordan’s cinematic film explores the angels’ love of BACARDÍ. DISCOVER MORE OUR RECOMMENDED RUMS LIKE THIS? TRY THESE If you enjoy this rum, here’s our recommendations of other BACARDĺ rums we think you’ll like VIEW OUR RUMS BACARDÍ carta blanca BACARDÍ carta oro BACARDÍ SPICED BACARDÍ RESERVA OCHO BACARDÍ RESERVA DIEZ VIEW OUR RUMS BACARDÍ Cocktails ELEVATED TASTE Use BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum to imbue your cocktails with a flair of sophistication. View all cocktails Cuatro Highball Cuatro Mismo Cuatro Remix Cuatro Smash Cuatro Cuba Libre Drag to discover more View all cocktails MERCHANDISE GET KITTED OUT Glasses. Squeezers. Cocktail kits. Discover everything you need to create standout BACARDÍ cocktails. SHOP NOW FAQ CURIOUS ABOUT RUM? WHAT DOES AÑEJO MEAN? Añejo comes from the Spanish word for ‘aged’. WHAT IS AGED RUM? Rum can be aged anywhere from one year upwards. Aging rum can add additional complexity to its flavour and mouthfeel. HOW DO YOU MAKE RUM? Rum is made using only three ingredients: molasses from sugarcane, yeast and water. Ingredients are fermented, then distilled, aged, filtered and blended. metadata.description: With color like shimmering gold, BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro delivers flavors smooth like honey, complemented by mild vanilla and toasted oak.
